mapper.select: SELECT position, default_role, can_dashboard, can_inquiries, can_members, can_employees, can_shifts, can_hamsters, can_products, can_cafe_customer, can_cafe, updated_at FROM position_permissions ORDER BY CASE position WHEN '本部' THEN 1 WHEN '店長' THEN 2 WHEN '副店長' THEN 3 WHEN 'リーダー' THEN 4 WHEN '一般従業員' THEN 5 WHEN '顧客' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END

SELECT position, default_role, can_dashboard, can_inquiries, can_members, can_employees, can_shifts, can_hamsters, can_products, can_cafe_customer, can_cafe, updated_at FROM position_permissions WHERE position = #{position}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO position_permissions ( position, default_role, can_dashboard, can_inquiries, can_members, can_employees, can_shifts, can_hamsters, can_products, can_cafe_customer, can_cafe, updated_at ) KEY(position) VALUES ( #{position}, #{defaultRole}, #{canDashboard}, #{canInquiries}, #{canMembers}, #{canEmployees}, #{canShifts}, #{canHamsters}, #{canProducts}, #{canCafeCustomer}, #{canCafe}, #{updatedAt} )
